chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.05.2025 Applicant present in person. Respondents No.4 & 5 present in person. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Addl. P.G. along with DSP Inayat Ali Qureshi SDPO Baldia, Inspector Ghulam Abbas Babar SHO PS Bhitai Nagar and SIP Muneer Ahmed PS Bhitai Nagar. -.-.-. On the last date of hearing SSP Hyderabad was directed to personally look into this matter and file a personal Report in this matter along with production of the detenue on the next date. Today a Report has been filed by the SSP Hyderabad and compliance Report has also been filed by the SDPO Baldia who states that detenue has been recovered from neighborhood and a mashirnama of alleged recovery was prepared in presence of mashirs and thereafter alleged detenue was brought to PS Bhitai Nagar where his statement was recorded. Thereafter mother of the detenue was called and his custody was handed over to her. The detenue is present in Court along with his mother who confirms that the detenue / his son has returned safely and is in her custody. In light of the above statements the present application u/s 491 Cr.P.C. (Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-221/2025) stands disposed off. J U D G E Ali Haider
